items.label: Light Arrows
items.note: Required — destroys each of the six elemental barriers

items.label: Fairies + Blue Potions
items.note: Fill your bottles for the barriers and the final fights

items.label: Goron Tunic
items.note: Heat protection for the Fire barrier's Lava Room

items.label: Fire Arrows
items.note: Light the Sun-Face cobweb in the Spirit barrier

items.label: Din's Fire
items.note: Lights torches in the Forest and Spirit barriers, burns the Boss Key traps

items.label: Mirror Shield
items.note: Reflects light onto the Sun Faces in the Spirit and Light barriers

items.label: Megaton Hammer
items.note: Rusty switches in the Shadow, Water and Spirit barriers

items.label: Blue Fire (bottled)
items.note: Melts the Red Ice in the Water barrier

items.label: Bombchus
items.note: Solves the Spirit barrier's bar-slit switch (and every dungeon item for GTG)
